From: "Dan Chipman" <dan_chipman@yahoo.com>
Subject: Standish
Date: Thu, 07 Feb 2008 20:58:30 GMT
To: "Darren Indyke" <dkiesq@aol.com>

Darren,

I will e-mail you the results of my conversation tomorrow with John Standish. I am going to suggest that he possibly rethink trying to do both projects at once. Where he isn't the low bidder on the R/O plant, that may also have an influence on his decision. 
Newman and Moll are going to have some pricing to John tomorrow for the office.

Dan


      ____________________________________________________________________________________
Never miss a thing.  Make Yahoo your home page. 
http://www.yahoo.com/r/hs
